title: Daily Update Report

posts.author: luke_P2G (Luke Wilkinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to have a daily update report that distributes via email the latest updates provided for a List Item?

I have 50 list items that provide a status overview of 50 different projects, routinely updates are provided against each project/list item, want these updates to be transferred to a report, which can be in a Monday Doc format and then have this emailed out?

Does Monday.com support something like this?

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @luke_P2G ,

Have a search for ’ Board Reports Automations ’ in the app Marketplace. It’s exactly what you’ve described:

image1053×673 84.9 KB

Feel free to drop us an email if you get stuck with any of it!
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @luke_P2G ,
Another option for your case can be addressed with the Board Email Reports app.
Every week toy can get automated xls-reports via email that shows the tasks closed.
There are also other types of reports on a board level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes
    You can share these reports with any stakeholder outside monday without guest access needed.
    This is an example email:
    image501×558 27.1 KB

    And the report content:
    image1323×370 48.4 KB

Check out the app for free to see if it works for you.
